label: v0.1.25 - restore runnable version archives
notes: Archive repair: reconstructs missing archives, aligns version sources of truth, and adds archive verification script.

label: v0.1.24 - split CSS by feature area
notes: Splits the monolithic styles.css into labelled files under styles/ with styles/main.css as the entrypoint, while keeping selectors and visual behaviour unchanged.

label: v0.1.23 - separate config, maintenance glue, and code map
notes: Adds app-config.js for version/URL constants, app-maintenance.js for runtime version/groove safety, updates helper defaults to neutral command-word guidance, and adds CODEMAP.md to document feature ownership.

label: v0.1.22 - refactor app utilities into helpers module
notes: Refactors shared helper logic out of app.js into app-helpers.js for readability/maintainability while keeping behavior unchanged.

label: v0.1.21 - version display/source-of-truth repair across all archives
notes: Fixes APP_VERSION mismatches in archived app.js files and aligns selector display with runtime version to ensure correct dropdown label and navigation.

label: v0.1.20 - single-source version display and selector loading fix
notes: Version selector now initializes from APP_VERSION/script logic instead of hardcoded HTML text, ensuring dropdown labels and navigation reflect correct version on load.

label: v0.1.19 - groove stack carousel polish + collapsible pack menu
notes: Adds softer carousel caret controls and stack hint, adds top menu scaffolding, makes pack panel collapsible, and hardens no-cache fetches so latest page loads on refresh.

label: v0.1.18 - groove carousel + collapsible pack sidebar
notes: Adds swipe/caret carousel to cycle command grooves and moves pack controls into a collapsible sidebar to keep the UI clean and minimal.

label: v0.1.17 - add canonical pack files and zip manifest bundle
notes: Adds missing manifest/explainer/command-set files and rebuilds ks2 zip with canonical structure for consistent default loading.

label: v0.1.16 - neutral command-groove fallback
notes: Replaces the global why-specific Reason → Effect → Link default with neutral command-word strategy wording; keeps Reason → Effect → Link only for why questions.

label: v0.1.15 - normalize groove content for all command words
notes: Fixes groove card content so each command word (including infer) shows its own heading/intro/steps from KS2 explainers instead of defaulting to why phrasing.

label: v0.1.14 - dynamic groove card by selected command
notes: Updates the top answer groove card dynamically based on the selected command word/question.

label: v0.1.13 - fix KS2 zip question parsing
notes: Fixes default bundled KS2 ZIP parsing for object-based files (questions arrays and combined command-word maps), so questions load on startup.

label: v0.1.12 - support default KS2 zip schema
notes: Fixes default bundled loading by supporting flat KS2 zip layouts without manifest/command-sets folders.

label: v0.1.11 - manual dialog close fix, compact version switcher, default KS2 zip
notes: Fixes manual dialog close button behavior, reduces width footprint of the top version selector, and defaults bundled load to ks2_command_word_json_files.zip.

label: v0.1.10 - split pack controls from groove panel
notes: Splits the command-word pack controls into a separate panel while leaving the why groove card in the original v0.1.2 style.

label: v0.1.9 - restore v0.1.2 explainer/groove wording and all set-selection modes
notes: Restores v0.1.2 why explainer and groove wording, implements tabs/dropdown/cards/checklist+apply plus source selector and search chips, and fixes filtering behavior so question text updates correctly.

label: v0.1.8 - restore full v0.1.2 explainer and groove card
notes: Restores full v0.1.2-style command word explainer steps in feedback, restores full top-right groove card, keeps bundled ZIP auto-load by default, and fixes duplicate explainer IDs causing incorrect rendering.

label: v0.1.7 - restore v0.1.2 explainer placement
notes: Restores command-word explainer to the feedback area like v0.1.2 while keeping command answer groove guidance in the top-right coach panel and retaining default bundled pack startup loading.

label: v0.1.6 - rebuilt default pack startup
notes: Rebuilds default startup to auto-load bundled ZIP pack with cleaner fallback behavior, and keeps command groove guidance in the top coach panel with step bullets.

label: v0.1.5 - default bundled pack and panel groove
notes: Loads the repository-hosted command-word ZIP pack by default on startup and moves command-word groove guidance into the top coach panel.

label: v0.1.4 - bundled ZIP pack loader
notes: Adds one-click loading of the repository-hosted command-word ZIP pack from command-set/ while keeping upload-based pack support.

label: v0.1.3 - command-word JSON pack support
notes: Adds command-word pack upload support for ZIP and richer JSON, command-set selection, external command explainers, manifest-aware loading, dynamic helpful-word checks, and richer question metadata display.

label: v0.1.2 - command explainer layout
notes: Moves exceptional answer below weak answer, adds command-word explainer, folds why-it-works into the exceptional answer box, removes inline labels from the model answer, and adds version switching.

label: v0.1.1 - interactive coach feedback
notes: Adds handwritten coach feedback, low/full marks stamps, safe bold source text, answer parts, and breakdown-to-answer highlighting.

label: v0.1.0 - first prototype
notes: Initial plain HTML, CSS and JavaScript prototype with the first 10 why-question practice items.
